title: Bags & Coins
description: Bags and Coins is a Minecraft mod that introduces an innovative currency system and inventory management options to enhance your gameplay experience.
body:
Description
Bags and Coins is a Minecraft mod that introduces an innovative currency system and inventory management options to enhance your gameplay experience. This mod adds a variety of coins, including copper, silver, and gold, which players can earn, trade, and use for transactions with villagers or other players. To complement the coins, the mod includes customizable bags that provide extra storage and unique aesthetic options, allowing players to carry their treasures and resources with style.

With Bags and Coins, players can engage in immersive trade systems, establish in-game economies, or simply organize their inventories more efficiently. Each bag can be upgraded for additional storage slots and adorned with distinct patterns to match your personal flair. Whether you’re an adventurer exploring distant lands or a builder managing vast amounts of materials, this mod offers both practicality and fun for every Minecraft enthusiast.

 

List of Coins (v. 1.0.0)

Copper Coin
Iron Coin
Gold Coin
Diamond Coin
Netherite Coin

Added items:

Copper Nuggets
Diamond Shard
Netherite Nuggets
Coin Mold
Hammer
Leather Bag

Plans for Future Updates:

Redstone Coin
Lapiz Coin
Emeral Coin
Other Types of Bag 
New Villager Type 
-Banker (Trades Copper,Iron,Gold etc. for coins)
-Coin Collector (Trades Coins for random items)
